synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-2477 Oracle Linux 8 .NET 10.0 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2477
description:
[10.0.103-1.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[10.0.103-1]
- Update to .NET SDK 10.0.103 and Runtime 10.0.3
- Resolves: RHEL-144973
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2477

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-2477.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
aspnetcore-runtime-10.0-10.0.3-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

- Resolves: RHEL-144973
